title: coreopsis grandiflora var. harveyana
intro: Coreopsis grandiflora var. harveyana, also known as the Large-flowered Tickseed, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Coreopsis grandiflora var. harveyana include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
